title: Osmania University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Osmania University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
